### To Reproduce

```py
import torch.multiprocessing as mp
import cupy as cp

mp.set_start_method('spawn', force=True)
......
with mp.Pool(processes=mp.cpu_count()) as pool:
       transformed_list = pool.starmap(self._process_image, [(image[b, c].detach(),) for b in range(B) for c in range(C)])
      # the _process_image function is written by cupy 
......
```


### Installation

Source (`pip install cupy`)

### Environment

```
OS                           : Linux-5.15.0-118-generic-x86_64-with-glibc2.35
```

### Additional Information

Actually, when I run my code on another linux systerm, the code run perfectly.
